AI algorithms or training methodologies may be flawed, and datasets may contain irrelevant, insufficient or biased information, which can cause errors in outputs. This may give rise to legal liability, damage our reputation

The use of AI in the development of our products...could also cause loss of IP, as well as subject us to risks, including third-party claims, related to IP infringement or misappropriation, data privacy and cybersecurity.

limitations: No quantified AI-specific capex or investment dollar amounts appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named initiatives and partnerships implied by product lines rather than disclosed spend figures.

AI narrative concreteness is driven primarily by revenue attribution to AI-related demand (advanced packaging, Taiwan customer investments) rather than KLA's own deployed AI tools with quantified internal results; score reflects deployed product use cases with operating detail.
Promotional/aspirational language present alongside risk disclosures; confidence in concreteness score modestly reduced.
